backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a quiz backend with functions to add questions, retrieve quizzes, submit answers with scoring, track user attempts by Principal, and generate a leaderboard sorted by total scores.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features related to debugging quiz submission flow and verifying authentication-aware data persistence logic in QuizPage.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of 15 frontend files covering routing, quiz pages, authentication, profile display, styling with warm wellness colors, and app market metadata.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, defining colors for UI elements like background, foreground, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with comprehensive meta tags for SEO, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, and app market discovery, branding the app as "Positivity Quiz" focused on mental wellness.
frontend/public/app-manifest.json: App manifest defining metadata for the Positivity Quiz including ID, version, wellness category, feature list, and market publication status for app discovery.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, quiz, results, and profile pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Layout with Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AttemptCard.tsx: Card component displaying a single quiz attempt with formatted timestamp, score percentage, performance badge, and contextual feedback message based on score level.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Reusable authentication button that toggles between login and logout states using the useInternetIdentity hook, displaying loading states during authentication.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackCard.tsx: Animated card component with staggered fade-in effect displaying supportive feedback messages with a check icon, used on the results page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper providing header with branding, conditional profile navigation for authenticated users, authentication button, and footer with attribution and disclaimer.
frontend/src/components/QuizQuestion.tsx: React component that renders a single quiz question with radio button options, handling answer selection and visual feedback for the selected choice.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching questions, submitting answers, and retrieving quiz attempts (user-specific and all attempts) from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm, calming color palette (peach, pink, lavender) for a mental wellness theme, including light and dark mode variants.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page component displaying the Positivity Quiz introduction with feature cards (Safe Space, Personalized, Supportive) and a call-to-action button to start the quiz.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page that displays quiz attempt history and statistics (total attempts, average score) for authenticated users, or prompts login for unauthenticated visitors.
frontend/src/pages/QuizPage.tsx: Quiz page component that displays questions one at a time with navigation, tracks user answers, and submits results either to backend (authenticated) or localStorage (anonymous). Includes default fallback questions if backend has none.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Results page component that retrieves quiz results from localStorage, calculates score/percentage, displays personalized feedback based on performance, and offers login option for anonymous users to save results.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color palette using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for borders/shadows/animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata indicating this is a fix request for a positivity quiz app with known issue of questions not progressing/submitting, tracking two features related to debugging quiz submission logic.
